authScheme.description: A token is used to authenticate with the app. This property is only returned for the `TOKEN` authentication scheme.

signing.description:
Only used for the Okta Org2Org (`okta_org2org`) app.

The signing key rotation setting.

rotationMode.description: The signing key rotation setting for the provisioning connection

_links.description: Specifies link relations (see [Web Linking](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8288)) available using the [JSON Hypertext Application Language](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-kelly-json-hal-06) specification. This object is used for dynamic discovery of related resources and lifecycle operations.

hints.description: Describes allowed HTTP verbs and guidance for the `href`

guidance.description: Specifies the URI to invoke for granting scope consent required to complete the OAuth 2.0 connection
